sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 11:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 11:1
items.html: The real vessels of reception in each degree, which expand by the power of the reflected light in the screen, from it and below, are called the Guf [body] of the degree, since they precede the lights. It is unlike the lights that expand for a coupling by striking on the screen, which precede the vessels.
